title: umbilicus horizontalis
intro: Umbilicus horizontalis, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Umbilicus horizontalis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and even help alleviate symptoms of insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
